section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column (3 assets), attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP/DC/JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. Filled cells align across all three columns (identical selections): Value C, Type of Income None, Amount A. The Transaction row is a continuous black band across all three columns with no P/S/E letter visible - treated as divider/redaction, transaction recorded null.

uncertainties.read: Transaction row black-filled across all 3 columns
uncertainties.note: continuous black band with no P/S/E letter visible; treated as divider/redaction, recorded null for all three assets
